instruction: Design a CARLA test scenario JSON with all fields (start: <<<JSON_START>>>):
input: Stop-and-go traffic following pattern in urban congestion. The ego vehicle follows a blue Nissan Patrol at 8 m/s in congested urban traffic, maintaining 15-20 meters distance. The lead vehicle exhibits typical stop-and-go behavior: hard braking (0.8 force) at 1.5 seconds, accelerating to 6 m/s at 4 seconds, near-stopping (0.9 force brake) at 7 seconds, then accelerating to 10 m/s at 10 seconds. This reinforces same-lane following in heavy traffic conditions.
output:

  "scenario_name": "stop_and_go_following_263",
  "description": "Stop-and-go traffic following pattern in urban congestion",
  "weather": "clear_sunset",
  "ego_vehicle_model": "vehicle.audi.a2",
  "ego_spawn": {
    "criteria": {
      "lane_type": "Driving",
      "is_intersection": false,
      "road_context": "urban"
    }
  },
  "ego_start_speed": 8,
  "actors": [
    {
      "id": "lead_car",
      "type": "vehicle",
      "model": "vehicle.nissan.patrol",
      "spawn": {
        "criteria": {
          "lane_type": "Driving",
          "distance_to_ego": {
            "min": 15,
            "max": 20
          },
          "relative_position": "ahead",
          "road_relationship": "same_road",
          "lane_relationship": "same_lane",
          "road_context": "urban"
        }
      },
      "color": "50,50,200"
    }
  ],
  "actions": [
    {
      "actor_id": "lead_car",
      "action_type": "brake",
      "trigger_type": "time",
      "trigger_value": 1.5,
      "brake_force": 0.8,
      "dynamics_dimension": "time",
      "dynamics_shape": "step",
      "dynamics_value": 1.0
    },
    {
      "actor_id": "lead_car",
      "action_type": "speed",
      "trigger_type": "time",
      "trigger_value": 4.0,
      "speed_value": 6.0,
      "dynamics_dimension": "time",
      "dynamics_shape": "linear",
      "dynamics_value": 2.0
    },
    {
      "actor_id": "lead_car",
      "action_type": "brake",
      "trigger_type": "time",
      "trigger_value": 7.0,
      "brake_force": 0.9,
      "dynamics_dimension": "time",
      "dynamics_shape": "step",
      "dynamics_value": 0.8
    },
    {
      "actor_id": "lead_car",
      "action_type": "speed",
      "trigger_type": "time",
      "trigger_value": 10.0,
      "speed_value": 10.0,
      "dynamics_dimension": "time",
